gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/252)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/252)
text: جَاءَ رَجُلٌ إِلَى أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) فَقَالَ إِنِّي أَهْدَيْتُ جَارِيَةً إِلَى الْكَعْبَةِ فَأُعْطِيتُ خَمْسَمِائَةِ دِينَارٍ فَمَا تَرَى قَالَ بِعْهَا ثُمَّ خُذْ ثَمَنَهَا ثُمَّ قُمْ عَلَى هَذَا الْحَائِطِ حَائِطِ الْحِجْرِ ثُمَّ نَادِ وَ أَعْطِ كُلَّ مُنْقَطَعٍ بِهِ وَ كُلَّ مُحْتَاجٍ مِنَ الْحَاجِّ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Salih Bin Al Sandy, from Ja’far Bin Bashir, from Aban, from Abu Al Hassan,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘A man came over to Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> and he said, ‘I gifted a slave girl to the Kabah and had given five hundred Dinars, so what is your<sup>asws</sup> view?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Sell her, then take her price and stand upon this wall, a wall of the (Black) Stone. Then call out and give everyone who has been cut off (by bandits), and every needy one from the pilgrims’.
en.sarwar: 24. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Salih ibn al-Sindiy from Ja’far ibn Bashir from Aban who has said the following: “Abu al-Hassan, has narrated from abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhim al-Salam, who has said that once a man came to abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, and said, ‘I have donated a slave-girl to al-Ka‘bah and I have received five hundred dinar; how do you consider it? He (the Imam) said, ‘Sell her and take the funds from her sale. Stand up near the Black Stone and call those of Hajj who are looted on the way or are needy and distribute it among them.’”
